message:
feat(core): expand subquery evaluation and improve error types

connection.rs: Extend rewrite_in_subqueries() to eagerly evaluate
EXISTS (SELECT ...) and scalar (SELECT ...) subquery expressions in
addition to the existing IN (SELECT ...) support. Replace generic
FrankenError::Internal for missing tables with a typed
FrankenError::NoSuchTable variant for better error handling. Fix
import formatting.

codegen.rs (fsqlite-vdbe): Add test infrastructure for subquery
codegen with test_schema_with_subquery_source() fixture providing
a two-table schema. Add comprehensive codegen tests for IN subquery
evaluation through the VDBE program builder.

engine.rs: Minor adjustment to engine dispatch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
